title: Senior Software Engineer-Backend
score_reasoning: You are a strong candidate for this Senior Backend role on Toast's Payments team. Your 7 years building distributed services, microservices architecture expertise, and proven track record with payment systems (€2M/month billing engine at Stackflo) directly align with the payment processing and API scalability focus. Your Python/Go and PostgreSQL experience match the core tech stack. Dublin is within Europe, providing reasonable timezone overlap with Berlin (±1h), and the hybrid model is compatible with your preferences. However, the role's 'nice-to-have' Kotlin/Java requirement is a gap (you are Python/Go-focused), and event-driven architecture expertise would strengthen your fit further. Growth potential is strong given fintech complexity and payment processing criticality, though the role is not purely backend infrastructure—some cross-functional work with PM/UX is expected. Overall, a solid medium-to-high fit.

red_flags: Kotlin/Java preferred; you are Python/Go-focused (not a blocker, but a learning curve)
Event-driven architecture listed as nice-to-have; limited evidence in your profile beyond basic pub/sub
Role emphasizes cross-functional collaboration with PM/UX; primarily backend-focused in your background
